channel.title: Neovim on MonkeMan's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Neovim on MonkeMan's Blog

item.title: Neovim Tricks
item.description: Neovim Cheat sheet This is a short cheat sheet for important keybindings in vim more specific for neovim. I am using NVChad as such not all keybindings are applicable to standard vim/nvim. Capitalization is important! Modes: ESC, switch to normal mode. v, switch to visual mode. i or a, switch to insert mode. R, replace mode. Navigation: arrow keys, shame on you! Movement keys, can be combined with arbitrary number h, to the left.
